title: bhesa indica
intro: Bhesa indica, also known as the Himalayan Bhasa or Bhesa, is a plant species native to the Himalayan and Eastern Asian regions. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant contains alkaloids, glycosides, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Bhesa indica is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, and its health benefits may include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health.
